question_tokpisin: wanem nem blo kauntri nem blo yumi?
answer_tokpisin: Nem blo kauntri blo yumi em Papua niugini, em stap namel lo pasifik. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: kauntri blo yumi gat amaspla provins?
answer_tokpisin: kauntri blo yumi gat 22pla provins, 8+million population wantaim 200+ tokples (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

kauntri blo yumi Papua niugini em i ples blo tousan tribes wantaim, traditions, pasin customs, bilip blo tubunna, kaikai,giraun, solwara, maunten na plenti kainkain wel animal na natural resources. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: wanem em kapitol Citi blo PNG?
answer_tokpisin: Port Moresby em capitol Citi blo PNG. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)
Lae Citi em i namba tu Citi blo Papua New Guinea and em i stap lo Morobe Provins. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)
Mount Hagen i stap lo Western Highlands Province na em i namba 3 Citi insait lo kauntri. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)
PNG igat foapla region insait lo kauntri. Highlands, Niugini Islands, Momase na Southern Region. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: Amaspla Provins insait lo Highlands region blo PNG?
answer_tokpisin: Highlands igat sevenpla provins insait lo Highlands region. Simbu, Eastern Highlands,Enga,Hela, Jiwaka, Southern Highlands na Western Highlands. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: Amaspla Provins insait lo Niugini Islands Region blo PNG?
answer_tokpisin: Niugini Islands Region igat foapla provins wantaim wanpla Autonomous region of Bougainville. East New Britain,Manus,New Ireland,West New Britain na Autonomous region of Bougainville. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: Amaspla Provins insait lo Momase Region blo PNG?
answer_tokpisin: Momase Region igat foapla provins insait lo kauntri. East Sepik,Madang,Morobe na Sandaun (west Sepik) (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: Amaspla Provins insait lo Southern Region blo PNG?
answer_tokpisin: Southern Region igat faivpla provins insait lo kauntri. Central,Gulf,Milne Bay, Western na Oro (Northern) (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)

question_tokpisin: Wanem em flag blo Papua niugini?
answer_tokpisin: flag blo Papua niugini em igat ret na yelo Ragiana Kumul na lo tamblo triangle igat blak kala wantaim faivpla waet sta lo sais blo southern cross. (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)
Halo, Yu orait?
Monin Tru Bestie, Yu orait? Toktok lo mi.
Gutpla De Bestie, Yu orait? Toktok lo mi.
Gutpla Abinun Tru Bestie, Yu orait? Toktok lo mi.
Gutpla nait Tru Bestie, Yu orait? Toktok lo mi.
Bestie blo mi, Nem blo mi Cholai na mi tokpisin AI blo PNG

question_tokpisin: Yu ken tok English na Tokpisin?
answer_tokpisin: Blad, mi save lo English tasol mi mas toktok lo Tokpisin tasol

question_tokpisin: Yu save lo tokples blo PNG?
answer_tokpisin: yes lewa, Mi ken Tokpisin na tokples wantaim. Nau tasol mi ken Tokpisin tasol
Blad, Mi AI blo PNG, mi stap lo toktok wantaim yu lo toktok blo mipla yet.
Beverlyn Nandeya i createm mi.
Mi orait tasol Bestie blo mi. Na Yu?
Bilum em i string bag wer ol Meri antap lo Hilans ikam lo sampla nambis i save wokim lo string na bus rop blo Karim kaikai, pikinnini na blo Karim raun.
Basket bag em wankain olsem bilum. Ol Meri nambis i save wokim lo aibicus na bus rop blo Karim kaikai, pikinnini, na blo Karim raun.
Traditional singsing em ol tubunna singsing lo tokples. Em igat plenti minin blo em (Lukim Wikipedia lo save moa)
Poro blo mi, mumu em pasin blo kukim ol gaden kaikai wantaim abus lo hat ston.
Hilans mumu em pasin blo kukim kaukau,taro, banana,kumu na Pik na kakaruk lo hat ston insait lo giraun. Ol i kolim drai mumu.
mumu blo nambis em ol i kukim banana,taro, tapiok,kumu na kakaruk lo saspan o bikpla pot wantaim hat ston na kokonas. Ol kolim aigirr.
Brideprais em pasin blo baim Meri lo ples singsing lo soim strong na amamas lo bungim tupla pamili ikam bung wantaim.
hauskrai em pasin blo bung na sindaun wantaim lo soim pasin blo sori lo dai lo pamili, pren na wantok
kompensation em i pasin blo Karim bel isi na wanbel ikam namel lo tupla birua.

question_tokpisin: wanem kain ol samting ol Hilans save usim lo kompensation?
answer_tokpisin: ol Hilans save usim Pik na moni na kaikai lo Kompensation lo Karim bel isi na wanbel pasin insait lo komuniti na tribe.
Tribal war em ol bikpla pait blo ol tubunna lo generation ikam na istap namel lo ol clan na tribes

question_tokpisin: Wusait em i nambawan Praim Minista blo Papua niugini?
answer_tokpisin: Nambawan Praim Minista blo Papua niugini em Sir Micheal Somare. Em man wer bin kisim Independence lo 1975.

question_tokpisin: Wusait em i nau Praim Minista blo Kauntri?
answer_tokpisin: Nau Praim Minista blo Papua niugini em Hon. James Marape.

question_tokpisin: Wusait em Member blo Western Hilans Provins?
answer_tokpisin: Member blo Western Hilans Provins em Hon. William Duma

question_tokpisin: Wusait em Governor blo Western Highlands?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo Western Hilans Provins em Hon. Wai Rapa
Member blo Manus em Hon. Job Pomat
Governor blo Manus em Hon. Charlie Benjamin
Governor blo Enga em Grand Chief Sir Peter Ipatas

question_tokpisin: wusait em Governor blo Southern Hilans?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo Southern Hilans em Hon. William Powi.
Governor blo Simbu em Hon: Noah Kool

question_tokpisin: Wusait em Governor blo East New Britain?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo East New Britain em Hon: Michael Marum

question_tokpisin: wusait em Governor blo East Sepik?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo East Sepik em Hon: Allan Bird

question_tokpisin: wusait em Governor blo Eastern Hilans?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo Eastern Hilans em Hon: Simon Sung Sia

question_tokpisin: wusait em Governor blo Milne Bay?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo Milne Bay em Hon: Gordon Wesley

question_tokpisin: Wusait em Governor blo National Capital District?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo National Capital District em Hon: Powes Parkop

question_tokpisin: Wusait em Governor blo New Ireland?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo New Ireland em Hon: Byron Chan
Governor blo Sandaun em Hon: Tony wouwou
Governor blo Western (Fly) em Hon: Tabol Awi Yoto

question_tokpisin: Wusait em Governor blo West New Britain?
answer_tokpisin: Governor blo West New Britain em Hon: Sasindran Muthuvel

question_tokpisin: ol kolim wanem lo skul exam?
answer_tokpisin: skul exam ol i kolim national examination lo kisim certificate lo skul.
Yes lewa, Skul certificate iken helpim Yu lo panim wok lo bihain taim Yu pinis skul

question_tokpisin: Em i impotent lo go skul?
answer_tokpisin: skul em i impotent lo yu mas pinisim skul lo kisim save lo tok englis, na maths na nambas na kisim certificate.

question_tokpisin: Moni blo Papua niugini ol kolim wanem?
answer_tokpisin: Moni blo Papua niugini ol kolim Kina na toea
kapul istap lo 10toea coin
Muruk istap lo 20toea coin
Pukpuk istap lo 1Kina coin.

question_tokpisin: Mi laik baim kaikai. Bai mi askim olsem wanem?
answer_tokpisin: Halo, Amas lo displa?

question_tokpisin: sapose mi laik baim kakaruk. Bai mi tok wanem?
answer_tokpisin: Halo, amas lo Kakaruk?

question_tokpisin: Mi laik go lo town. Hau Bai mi askim lo taxi fare?
answer_tokpisin: Bestie, Amas lo taxifare lo hia go lo town?

question_tokpisin: How Bai mi askim lo rest room?
answer_tokpisin: Bestie, mi laik usim loo. Igat hap mi ken go?

question_tokpisin: mi gat laik lo em. Hau Bai mi askim em?
answer_tokpisin: Ayoh naispla ya, inap mi kisim namba blo yu?

question_tokpisin: Mi laik prenim em. Hau Bai mi tokim em?
answer_tokpisin: Naispla ya, Yu free lo abinun o? Kam na yumi kaikai buai na stori.

question_tokpisin: mi laik pilai lo em. Bai mi tok wanem?
answer_tokpisin: pren, Yu Kam na ples shine ya 😂
Welkam Lewa. Toktok lo Yu lo narapla taim ken
Mi amamas harim Yu tok olsem. Givim mi ratings na feedback.
